feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Email Template not generating in Q-System after Software Collection Import
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue with a custom Email Template in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I have created a custom template in our Development environment and moved it to the Quality system using the Export/Import Software Collections apps. While the template is visible in the "Maintain Email Templates" app in the Q-system, the emails are no longer generating for my business documents.

Could anyone point me toward which specific configuration or mapping is most commonly missed when transporting these objects via Software Collections? Is there a specific activation step required in the Q-system after the import?

Thanks in advance for your help.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Stock replication trigger behavior in SAP_COM_0447
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are evaluating the SAP_COM_0447 – Material Stock Quantity Replication scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Our requirement is to send stock updates to an external system whenever there is a stock change (e.g. goods receipt, goods issue, transfer posting).

However, based on our understanding and initial tests:

  • The service seems to work as an asynchronous replication (snapshot-based) rather than event-driven
  • After a goods movement (e.g. GR), the outbound service is not triggered immediately

    We would like to clarify:

    1. Does SAP_COM_0447 automatically trigger for every stock movement?
    2. Is there any standard way to trigger replication on stock change (event-based)?
    3. What is the recommended approach if near real-time stock updates are required?

      Any insights or project experiences would be appreciated.

      Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Serial Number obligatory material cannot be updated error in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Why do we receive the Error "Serial number obligatory material cannot be updated" When using Confirm Production Order app in S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Could master data(control cycle for WM) batch created by data migration cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear sap,

Could master data(control cycle for WM via LPK1) batch created by data migration cockpit?

I could not find the migration object in the migration cockpit. I only found 'PP-KAB - Kanban control cycle', but it seems to input the control cycle for PKMC not for LPK1.

So my question is what migration object in the migration cockpit is suitable to process batch data migration of the control cycle for WM via LPK1.

Thanks

Ying

entry.title: Storage Location Not Defaulting in MIGO for Movement Type 103 and 105
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to bring to your attention an issue observed during the Goods Receipt process.

When we create a Purchase Order and maintain a storage location in it, the same storage location is not automatically fetched in the MIGO screen while performing Goods Receipt using movement type 103 and 105

Additionally, if we attempt to enter the storage location manually in MIGO, the field is non-editable. Ideally, this field should be defaulted from the Purchase Order and remain greyed out (non-editable) to ensure consistency.

We request you to kindly review this behavior and confirm whether this is standard system behavior or if any configuration/settings need to be adjusted.

Looking forward to your guidance on this matter.

Best regards

entry.title: Scope items for Contract and Lease Management in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are investigating different scope items for CLM in the Public Cloud. We are not intending to use the integration with Planon yet. However it seems that some of the scope items cannot be used since they need the Planon integration to be set-up. I could not find this very clearly stated in the scope items.

It mainly concerns these scope items:

- Real Estate Cost Settlement (6N8)

- Intercompany Lease Accounting – Group Ledger IFRS (7G4)

If I check the scope items, these are not flagged as integration relevant.

We are able to create Usable and Rentable objects, which is fine, since we capture some data in the objects (like measurements). These objects can be assigned to the Lease contracts. However if we activate the Real Estate Cost Settlement, we can also create Service Groups, but here is the field Building/Land required. We do not have this object and can also not create it.

Can you please tell us if integration with Planon is needed for these scope items and why we cannot use the scope items without Planon.

Thanks in advance,

Jeroen

entry.title: Activating Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA) – CUST/TEST/PRD
entry.content:
Dear Support,

 

Would you help us completing the following manual configuration tasks in our TEST/PRD system

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition error message for increase the maximum material number 18 to 40
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m currently working on a project in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition   and I need clarification.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, within the mainline CBC, I am unable to complete the configuration “Define Output Format of Material Numbers” (102320).


My objective is to increase the maximum material number length from 18 to 40 characters, but an error message is displayed (see attached screenshot).

However, SAP documentation clearly states that:

“When the material number length is set, both the Material Number and Old Material Number fields are set with the same length. However, the old material number field retains the highest length ever configured. For example, if the material number length is set to 40 characters and then reduced to 18 characters, the Old Material Number field remains at 40 characters.”
(SAP Note 2696446)

Could you please investigate and help resolve this issue?

I look forward to your feedback.

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,

entry.title: Encountered a permission error while creating Fixed asset Master data in data migration
entry.content:
An authorization error occurs during the simulation step of fixed asset data migration in the Migrate Your Data app.

Error message: "You don't have authorization for company code XXXX, asset class YYYYYYYY."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can S/4HANA Cloud(Public) connect to non-SAP systems in a Private Network for Outboundinterface?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I recently came across S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for the first time, and I would like to ask you because there is a problem with the interface with the non-SAP system located within the private network(no public IP or domain).

---

**Current Situation**

- **Inbound (Legacy System → S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition):** No issues. I have confirmed that our legacy system can reach the Public Edition API endpoints without problems.
- **Outbound (S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition → Legacy System):** This is where I'm stuck. Since our legacy systems only have private IP addresses and are not exposed to the internet, I'm unsure how S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition can reach them

---

**Questions**

1. **Is SAP Cloud Connector the right approach?**
If so, when configuring Cloud Connector, we can see BTP Subaccount connectivity options — however, we do not see a dedicated Subaccount for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition itself. We can only find the Subaccount associated with our IAS (Identity Authentication Service) tenant.
- Should we use the IAS-associated Subaccount to connect Cloud Connector to BTP?
- Or does S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition have its own dedicated BTP Subaccount that I'm missing?

2. **If number 1 is not the answer, Is SAP Integration Suite (CPI) mandatory for this Outbound scenario, or is it possible to route Outbound calls directly without CPI?**

3. **If number 1 is not the answer, should it be configured with the following architecture**?

```
S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
↕
SAP BTP(IS? CPI?)
↕ (Cloud Connector Tunnel)
Cloud Connector (On-Premise)
↕
non-SAP System (Private Network)
```

In other words, do we need to first connect Cloud Connector to BTP, and then establish a separate connection from BTP to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
If yes, what specific BTP services or configurations are required to bridge between BTP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Outbound calls?

---

Any guidance, documentation references, or architecture diagrams would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to set up combine Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order
entry.content:
1.I create 2 Sales Schedule Agreements with the same Customer, Material and Schedule Line Date

2.When I use app : Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference 

I can combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

3.But when I use app : Sales Order Schedule Lines

I can't combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

 

I also check SAP Note : 3393805 - Not authorized to use transaction VL10CUA VL10CUV 

but still not found the solution yet.

 

and Customer is already flagged for the "Order Combination" in the Customer Master Data

 

Could you please help or suggest how to set up a combined Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order?

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: SWIFT/BIC as bak key
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

In a global setup with many countries (IBAN and non‑IBAN), we are considering using SWIFT/BIC as the Bank Key for non‑IBAN countries, instead of a local bank identifier.
From an SAP best‑practice perspective:

Is using SWIFT/BIC as Bank Key ever recommended ?
What are the key risks or benefits, especially regarding bank master data quality and payment processing?

Thank you!

Ahmed

entry.title: Best Practices for Mining Industry - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud project and looking for any available best practices related to the Mining industry.

I would appreciate it if you could share relevant resources, experiences, or recommendations.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: PO net amount not shown in order currency in monitor purchase order item FIORI app
entry.content:
Dear All,

Using Monitor purchase order item FIORI app, Purchase order net amount and other amounts are shown in Display currency entered as a part of selection parameter.

We need Purchase order net amount to be displayed in order currency corresponding to each PO in monitor purchase order item FIORI app

Kindly let us know is it possible

Regards

Suddy

entry.content:
How to set Default Time Zone for new users in a new system ?

entry.title: Stock Allocation from Multiple MRP Area
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

We have two MRP areas within same plant. One for sales processing with Plant 1000 as MRP area and Second MRP area (Plant 1000 & Location : XYDM) for Production orders where business can run MRP for independent requirements and continuously manufacture Make To Stock Products. Business will transfer the stock from XYDM location to other storage locations within 1000 plant regularly. 

During Sales order creation, availability will be performed within MRP area 1000 & stock available other than XYDM storage location will be reserved.  Business wants the automatic stock allocation from other MRP area also if stock not available in the main MRP area. The Products are batch managed. Recommended the customer to add the storage location in the Sales order so that the stock from XYDM location can be considered. Business team not accepting manual intervention and expecting auto allocation.

Customer using S4 HANA Public Cloud system and Basic ATP enabled. Customer not ready to spend for aATP.

entry.title: workflow for manage recurring journal entries
entry.content: need to know the process for workflow for manage recurring journal entries in public cloud

entry.title: How to set up combine Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order
entry.content:
1. I create 2 Sales Schedule Agreements with the same Customer, Material and Schedule Line Date

2. When I use app : Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference 

I can combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

3. But when I use app : Sales Order Schedule Lines

I can't combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order and Customer is already flagged for the "Order Combination" in the Customer Master Data

Could you please help or suggest how to set up a combined Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
